inputs.label: First Number (Minuend)
inputs.businessContext: The value from which another number is to be subtracted.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value from which another number is to be subtracted.

inputs.label: Second Number (Subtrahend)
inputs.businessContext: The value to be subtracted from the first number.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value to be subtracted from the first number.

inputs.label: Rounding Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the intermediate difference for final output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the intermediate difference for final output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai çıktı için ara farkın yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı.

inputs.label: Offset
inputs.businessContext: A constant added to the rounded difference (e.g., calibration or zero-offset).

businessContext_i18n.en: A constant added to the rounded difference (e.g., calibration or zero-offset).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yuvarlanmış farka eklenen sabit (örn. kalibrasyon veya sıfır ofseti).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
